function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: Invoice resend - INV-0010 (2026-03-23)
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_23__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md
related_entities:
  - claudia
---
Hi Claudia,

Resending the requested invoice from 23-03-2026 (INV-0010) for Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbound record written successfully; verification checks pass (attachment path was read, single attachment ordering valid, recipient matches canonical entity, YAML safe). Next complete cleanup by deleting processed inbox file.

function.message: Processed the next inbox item by preparing a durable outbound email draft to Claudia with the requested 2026-03-23 invoice attached, then removed the inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), read system workflows for inbox + email processing, verified sender identity against canonical entity primary_contact_email, created outbound record in 60_outbox/outbox using sending-email schema, and deleted inbox item only after successful completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox email header requested resending invoice dated 23-03-2026; canonical sender identity matched Claudia's primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md; matching invoice record was read at 50_finance/invoices/2026_03_23__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md and attached in outbound draft file 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md; cleanup done by deleting processed inbox file per inbox workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: read finance rulebooks and target invoice file
